NAVAREA XIX 117/20

1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 020630 UTC DEC 20 
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W. 

72-29.3N 020-22.7E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
71-16,6N 022 16,6E SCARABEO 8
65-31.3N 007-29.3E LEIV ERIKSSON 

NOTES: A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE. 
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW 

2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 116/20
